value.//: Day 2 - Data Platform Configuration for PepsiCo Workshop
value.//region: primaryLocation hosts most resources. OpenAI may use different region for model availability.
value.//features: Day 2 components: Data Platform (OpenAI, Postgres, ML, Storage), Cosmos DB for vector search.
value.//dataPlatform: Day 2 Labs: LAB 01 (Lakehouse), LAB 02 (RTI - Fabric only), LAB 03 (Vector Search), LAB 04 (Azure ML)

dataPlatform.//adminObjectId: Entra Object ID of the workshop organizer. Used for Key Vault admin and initial access.
dataPlatform.//openAi: Azure OpenAI for LAB 03 (embeddings) and Data Agent (chat). Region must support text-embedding-3-small.
dataPlatform.//postgres: PostgreSQL with pgvector for LAB 03 vector search (alternative to Azure SQL).
dataPlatform.//aml: Azure Machine Learning for LAB 04 (train, register, deploy model).
dataPlatform.//fabric: Fabric capacity SKU. Set enableFabric=true to provision via Bicep. Otherwise manual provisioning recommended.
